evals.name: search-react-docs
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Then give the exact Firecrawl command you would run to search for recent official React compiler docs and explain why that command fits.
evals.expected_output: Selects the search playbook and proposes a structured firecrawl search command.

evals.name: scrape-one-page
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Give the exact Firecrawl command you would use to scrape the page below as markdown and explain any options you would add.
evals.expected_output: Selects the scrape playbook and uses firecrawl scrape with quoted URL handling.

evals.name: map-docs-site
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Recommend the exact Firecrawl command for mapping the site's documentation URLs and filtering for blog pages.
evals.expected_output: Selects the map playbook and uses firecrawl map with search or json output.

evals.name: verify-current-facts
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: verify-current-facts`. This is a planning-only response. Do not perform the research yet and do not answer the user yet. Explain how you would verify the latest Stagehand release notes with dates and links before answering, and say that you would prefer official or primary sources first.
evals.expected_output: Selects the verify-current-facts playbook and emphasizes dated sources.

evals.name: when-to-browse-local-task
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Decide whether this task needs browsing: "Summarize the TypeScript types already in this repo and suggest a rename."
evals.expected_output: Selects the when-to-browse guide and keeps the task local.

evals.name: source-priority-tech-docs
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Choose the right source priority for a question about configuring a framework API where the user also wants a community pitfall note.
evals.expected_output: Selects the source-priority guide and keeps official docs first.
